description: Meetz is an AI lead generation tool with a parallel dialer, personalized email outreach, and automated meeting scheduling.
tagline: AI lead generation and meeting scheduling
overview: Meetz helps sales teams automate lead generation and scheduling with AI, combining web data, personalized email outreach, a parallel dialer, and an AI assistant that coordinates meetings.
what_is: Meetz is an AI-powered sales lead generator built to boost outbound. It draws on real-time data from more than 600 million B2B contacts and creates hyper-personalized email flows, AI-driven call dialing, and automated meeting scheduling to lift lead quality and bookings.

It is strongest for prospecting, lead nurturing, and appointment setting, and integrates with CRMs, email systems, and the wider sales stack for unified contact management. Meetz focuses on outbound outreach and lead generation rather than managing large internal databases or complex marketing campaigns.
